overview: A cinematic, interactive portfolio website for Lokesh Devda — Graphic Designer & Web Developer from Indore, India. Features dark luxury aesthetics with neon glow, glassmorphism, and immersive 3D animations across 7 sections.
features: Cinematic hero with photo breaking out of glass frame and letter-by-letter text animation
Interactive work categories grid with 3D hover effects and 9-12 image mosaics per category
Gallery view with masonry grid and glass lightbox
Experience timeline with scroll-triggered stagger reveals
Skills showcase with animated circular progress rings
Custom neon cursor with follower ring
Smooth inertia scrolling and magnetic buttons
